title: sumpatheo #4834
definition:
1) to be affected with the same feeling as another, to sympathise with
 2) to feel for, have compassion on
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be affected with the same feeling as another, to sympathise with
 2) to feel for, have compassion on

    NASB:  to have a fellow feeling with, i.e. sympathize with:
